title: Gluttony destroys all magic on summon

card.rawText: When summoned, destroy all magic cards on the field. For each magic card destroyed, add +1 Modifier to this card. This card is unaffected by other Hit Modifier and Hit Dice Roll increases.

plan.title: Gluttony destroys all magic on summon
plan.summary: Summon Gluttony while field magic exists and verify its summon trigger destroys field magic.

notes: Player_2 has Ball and Chain equipped/in a magic slot before Gluttony is summoned.

steps: Inspect Gluttony and field magic slots.

expectedAssertions.label: Gluttony is summoned as primary creature

manualVerification: Confirm Gluttony's +1 Modifier per destroyed magic is covered separately.
riskNotes: This fixture isolates the on-summon destroy-all-magic clause.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
